name: 3pk Branches Battery LED Outdoor Light Stakes Black - Threshold™
description:
Cast a warm glow in your outdoor space with these 3-Piece Branches Battery LED Outdoor Light Stakes from Threshold™. The battery-operated light stakes come in a branch shape for a unique look. Designed with integrated LED bulbs that light up automatically, these weather-resistant light stakes require 3 AA batteries to illuminate your lawn or garden path with a soft glow.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
